sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The agent still didn't move (animation_changed: false, animation_changed_cell_count: 0). The agent is blocked by the red path area. I've used 71 actions so far, and I'm running out of the efficiency budget.
Let me reconsider the maze structure. The agent is at rows 32-36, cols 14-18. The target is at rows 49-55, cols 43-49. The agent needs to reach the bottom bar.
Looking at the ascii at rows 37-42, cols 13-19:
Row 37: ####### (black wall)
Row 38: #RRRRR# (black wall with red path)
Row 39: ##RRRR#### (black wall with red path)
Row 40: #RRRRRRRRR (black wall with red path)
Row 41: ##RRRR#### (black wall with red path)
Row 42: #RRRRR# (black wall with red path)
The red path is at cols 14-18, rows 38-42. The agent can't move DOWN through the red path.
But wait, maybe the red path is not a blocker. Maybe the agent can move through red cells. Let me check if the agent can move RIGHT from rows 32-36, cols 14-18 to reach the right side.
Actually, let me reconsider. The agent is at rows 32-36, cols 14-18. Looking at the ascii:
Row 32: .#@@@@@#...
Row 33: .#@@@@@#...
Row 34: .#@@#@@#...
Row 35: .#@@@@@#...
Row 36: .#@@@@@#...
The agent is surrounded by black cells at cols 13 and 19. The agent can't move LEFT or RIGHT because cols 13 and 19 are black walls.
Wait, but the agent can move RIGHT if cols 19-23 are black cells. Let me check the ascii at rows 32-36, cols 19-23:
Row 32: #... (col 19 is #, cols 20-22 is ...)
So col 19 is a black wall, but cols 20-22 are white passages. The agent can't move RIGHT.
Similarly, col 13 is a black wall, so the agent can't move LEFT.
The agent is stuck at rows 32-36, cols 14-18. The agent can move UP to rows 27-31, cols 14-18, or DOWN to rows 37-41, cols 14-18 (but rows 38-41 has red path).
Let me try moving UP to reach the top corridor, then RIGHT to reach the right side, then DOWN to reach the bottom bar.
Actually, I already tried this approach earlier. The agent moved UP from rows 32-36 to rows 8-12, then I tried moving RIGHT and DOWN, but the right vertical bar is too narrow.
Let me think about this differently. Maybe the agent needs to use SPACE to activate something, or maybe the agent needs to follow a different path.
Looking at the red path at rows 38-42, cols 14-18:
Row 38: #RRRRR# (black wall with red path)
Row 39: ##RRRR#### (black wall with red path)
Row 40: #RRRRRRRRR (black wall with red path)
Row 41: ##RRRR#### (black wall with red path)
Row 42: #RRRRR# (black wall with red path)
The red path seems to be a "door" or "gate" that the agent needs to pass through. Maybe the agent needs to use SPACE to open the gate.
Let me try pressing SPACE.
